notes.purpose: Workspace MCP starter template for team-shareable, safe defaults.
notes.secrets: Do not store secrets here. Use environment variables and local machine secret stores.
notes.team_vs_local: Commit only safe shared entries. Keep machine-specific overrides in untracked local files.
notes.composition: Replace placeholders only after the repo has selected real MCP servers and reviewed their commands.

repo-context.description: Template for a repo context MCP server that exposes read-only search or documentation queries.

local-automation.description: Template for a local automation server with an explicit allowlist of safe commands.

apps.notes: MCP Apps are opt-in UI-returning tools. Start disabled until reviewed by the team.
